designer.scope: Full design record (00-intake.md, 00-task.md, 10-design.md) + intake evidence capture. No 11-adr.md (no new architecture decision; rationale in 00-task.md).

breakdown_author.availability_note: Fable5 reachable as of 2026-07-04; earlier 'Fable5 unavailable' records (claude CLI auth re-routed to GLM/Zhipu) no longer apply. First stage with Fable5 as actual designer/breakdown author.

direction_synthesis.note: No new direction panel: the user explicitly decided the 5-point product wording in-session on 2026-07-04 (GPT draft -> Fable5 review with live evidence -> user confirmed '开工'). Direction authority = the user's recorded decisions in 00-intake.md.

implementers.scope: CONTRACT_WARNINGS[1] wording + contract doc paragraph + tests

diff_fingerprint_note: Two scopes, one protocol; task-level in tasks.<id> at H_A/H_B, stage-level top-level at H_C; status.json excluded from hash. Same formula as prior stages.
commit_order_strategy: H_intake (this commit: intake/task/design/status + live funding-semantics evidence under reports/api-samples/<stage-id>/) -> H_A (warnings wording + doc + tests) -> H_B (frontend) -> H_C (integration + stage-level fingerprint + finalize). Controller commits serially so each task's base..head diff is owner-scoped.

rationale: Wording amendment (evidence-backed, no logic change) + frontend display/i18n polish; user decided the product wording explicitly.
Multi-task, so design is recorded before coding (Fable5-authored this stage).
No new human gate: offline-only tasks; the only live capture happened at intake (anonymous public GET, precedent-compliant).

A.name: lastFundingRate warning semantic amendment
A.scope_constraint: snapshot.py: ONLY the CONTRACT_WARNINGS[1] string. contract doc: ONLY the lastFundingRate paragraph + its Open Verification Items entry.

B.name: Frontend Chinese-first + funding column merge + flags de-noise

reviewer_1_planned.note: Fresh read-only Claude-GLM session; must not reuse the controller/Task A transcript.

C.name: Integration verification (controller, no product code)
C.blocking_check: Offline snapshot rows must be field-identical to the accepted 548ae0d build (only warnings[1] text may differ); ANY rows diff -> BLOCKED.

excluded_for_core_work.reason: Grok stays excluded from implementation and review (per prior stages).
Fable5 is designer/breakdown author this stage -> design involvement -> excluded from review-2 final gate.

review_1_task_A.reason: implementer is claude_glm; cross-review selects Kimi.

review_1_task_B.reason: implementer is kimi; fresh read-only Claude-GLM session.

review_2_stage.runner_level_check: Decision pool = {GPT/Codex, Anthropic}. Anthropic (Fable5) is the designer this stage -> design involvement -> excluded. Both implementers hard-banned. Codex has no design/breakdown/code involvement this stage; its only prior involvement is the user-approved direction synthesis of the covering contract stage -> direction_synthesis disclosure override, same path as impl-v1/bstock-alias-v1. Fallback if Codex unavailable/invalid: decision_models_exhausted.

required_mitigation: Reviewers recompute diff_fingerprint from base_sha and raw git diff, not controller summaries.
Test output must contain replayable raw command output.
Review prompts pass raw artifact paths and raw diff paths.
Task B review-1 uses a fresh read-only Claude-GLM session.
Intake evidence (api-samples/<stage-id>/) is read-only during the stage; reviewers verify sha256 against evidence-index.md.

frozen_inputs.accepted_baseline: 6d8c0c4 (both prior stages accepted; snapshot rows structure frozen this stage — only warnings[1] text may change in the API payload)
frozen_inputs.intake_evidence: reports/api-samples/2026-07-public-market-ui-cn-v1/20260704T044945Z/ (premiumIndex + fundingRate captures, evidence-index.md sha256, verify-funding-semantics.py PASS)

hard_constraints: No API key, signed endpoint, private account endpoint, user data stream.
No order, borrow, repay, transfer, websocket.
No live HTTP during A/B/C (intake evidence already captured).
rows structure and all row values unchanged; only warnings[1] text changes in the API payload.
Frontend: single file, no new deps, same-origin /api/public-market/snapshot only, no direct Binance calls.
Rate percent formatting MUST be string-shift based; parseFloat/Number*100 is forbidden (decimal discipline at the display layer).
UI Chinese-first per user decision 2026-07-04: no raw English enums in the main table; technical terms (USDT, bStock, API) allowed.
next_action: H_intake committed (status=designing; Fable5-authored breakdown + live funding-semantics evidence). Next: controller (Claude-GLM) dispatches Task A per controller-start-prompt.md -> H_A, then Task B -> H_B, Task C -> H_C, review-1 (cross) -> review-2 (Codex, direction_synthesis disclosure) -> stage_accepted_waiting_user. Controller does NOT declare final acceptance.
